subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the holy fragrances wafting from the Most Glorious Paradise! This is the Day of the Covenant, verily, this is the appointed time [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انجذب بنفحات القدس المتهیجه من فردوس الابهی یوم یوم میثاقست و وقت وقت
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
